items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Scores Record In Face Of Shutdown Risk; Nvidia Breaks Out (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average and other major stock indexes ended Tuesday on a high note, even as investors awaited word on a Washington spending bill that could stave off a partial government shutdown at midnight.  Downbeat consumer confidence data had dampened investors' mood, but indexes eventually escaped losses.  On the stock market today, Spotify slid while Nvidia hit a new high.

items.title: Veteran Financial Advisor Lisa Armbrust Joins NFSG Corporation, Bringing 15 Years of Wealth Management Excellence from Morgan Stanley and Raymond James
items.description: BOCA RATON, Fla., September 30, 2025--NFSG welcomes Lisa Armbrust, Morgan Stanley & Raymond James advisor, strengthening wealth management team with family-focused financial guidance.

items.title: IBM Stock Gains on Quantum Optimism. This Analyst Isn’t Convinced.
items.description: International Business Machines  caused shock waves last week after it shared the results of a quantum-powered bond-trading experiment conducted with HSBC, but one analyst is questioning whether the news was overplayed.  The results, reached in collaboration with Vanguard, indicated that quantum computers could work with classical machines to deliver results on par with purely classical methods.  IBM shares barely reacted to the news in early trading Tuesday, a contrast to the jump that occurred after the HSBC experiment was unveiled on Thursday.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Stocks Down After Downbeat Consumer Data; Nvidia Hits New High (Live Coverage)
items.description: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index dropped Tuesday amid key economic data. CoreWeave and Nvidia stock were early winners.
